accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the Congressional Review Act (chapter 8 of title 5) is correct context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CRA reference is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies a DOE rule on walk-in cooler/freezer standards.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule is disapproved and will have no force or effect under the CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the approval date of May 9, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect: disapproval and nullification of the rule.

correct_entities.why: DOE, Congressional Review Act, and Federal Register citation are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation, publication date, and approval date all match the bill text.
